chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. 1st Appeal No. 03 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA 260/2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 16.12.2025. Mr. Wali Khan, Advocate for appellant. None present for respondent. = For reasons to be recorded, instant appeal is allowed and the judgment and decree passed by the Additional District Judge, Matli is set aside and the Summary Suit is decreed in terms of the prayer clause alongwith mark up from the date of filing of the suit till its realization. Office is directed to prepare the appellate judgment and decree in terms of this order. JUDGE Tufail
